title: Hover guard
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{DroidSeries |image=[[File:Hover_guard.png]] |name=Hover guard |creator= |manufacturer= |designer= |homeworld= |line= |model= |class=[[Sentry droid/Legends|Sentry droid]]{{CSWECite|II|64|hover guard}} |degree= |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender= |sensor=[[Color/Legends|Red]][[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]] |plating=Gray |armament=[[Light stunning blaster]]s {{C|2}} |equipment=*[[Repulsorlift/Legends|Repulsor engine]] *Sensor [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] {{C|2}} |affiliation=[[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] |firstmade= |retired= }} {{Quote|Their Guardian is ''attacking''!''"
"''Don't worry, you fool! The ''hover guards'' will take care of him!|[[Vlix Oncard]] and Tig Fromm, being attack by a disguised [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|}} The '''hover guards''' (also spelled '''hoverguard'''){{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-1|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} was a series of [[Sentry droid/Legends|sentry droids]] produced during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They resembled large flying [[Insect/Legends|insects]], and each was equipped with a tiny [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsor engine]] for propulsion. A pair of sensor [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] were located on a hover guard's front panel, and a [[light stunning blaster]] hung down from either side. [[Tig Fromm]], an [[Annoo-dat Blue]] [[Gangster/Legends|gangster]], used three such units as [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguards]]. ==Appearances== *[[Droids (1986) 2|''Droids'' (1986) 2]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-1|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} {{C|as "hoverguard"}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Hover Guard }} [[Category:Security droid models]]
